training_status: Active labor-intensive job; 14,000 steps/day, stair climbing 2-3x/hour, lifting 50lb bags repeatedly during 12-hour overnight shifts

benefits.description: Lost 9kg (19.8 lbs) in 14 days, starting at 156kg and reaching 147kg; visible belly shrinkage, clothes fitting better
Mirror changes ahead of scale; recomp felt real; body composition improving
Energy during overnight shifts stayed surprisingly solid once dosages were dialed in

side_effects.description: Fatigue experienced at higher initial dosages; resolved by lowering doses to current levels. Also noted that undereating triggered fatigue.
Appetite increased (especially after bumping SLU and 5-Amino); managed with protein shakes and water
SLU-PP-332 mixed with DMSO burns when injected too fast

protocol_notes: Compounds home-reconstituted from raw powder (10g raw powder, self-filled vials) except Retatrutide which was purchased pre-made. SLU-PP-332 dissolved with DMSO. OP titrated up from 500mcg Retatrutide slowly before reaching 15mg/week. Follows intermittent fasting, 300-350g protein/day, under 50g carbs/day, natural supplements, electrolytes, and prioritizes rest on days off. After 3 weeks total, OP dialed back to 40mg 5-Amino-1MQ and 20mg SLU-PP-332 daily. Monitoring blood glucose and blood pressure.
